message:
chore(beads): close bd-h9y (clippy warnings fixed in MySQL)

Completed fix for 75 clippy warnings in sqlmodel-mysql crate:
- Converted 30+ match patterns to let...else
- Added module-level allows for intentional patterns
- All warnings now resolved
